title: Vine Introduction
intendedTensionBeat: Vine visibly blocks the shortest route but does not yet grow aggressively.
intendedReleaseBeat: Cutting the vine lane makes the direct rescue path feel obvious and satisfying.
expectedPath: Take the central or shortest vine lane because it is visibly the rescue route.
expectedFailMode: Player treats vine as background clutter and detours too slowly.
designNotes: Vine should enter as route readability, not punishment.
